revision.comment: Bot: remove obsolete category Checkmark insertion templates
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Check_mark_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{| class="wikitable" align="center" style="width:60%;" |- ! colspan=4 style="background-color:black; color:white;"| {{Navbar-header|Check and cross marks|Check mark templates|fontcolor=white}} |- ! colspan=2 width="50%"| Check marks !!colspan=2| Cross marks |- | {{tl|tick}} = {{tlp|tick|20}}
{{tlp|tick|colour{{=}}purple}}
{{tlp|tick|color{{=}}cyan}}
{{tl|check mark}} | {{Tick}}
{{Tick|colour=purple}}
{{Tick|color=cyan}}
{{check mark}} | {{tl|cross}} = {{tlp|cross|20}}
{{tlp|Cross|colour{{=}}orange}}
{{tlp|Cross|color{{=}}black}} | {{Cross}}
{{Cross|colour=orange}}
{{Cross|color=black}} |- | {{tl|aye}} and {{tl|Y}} || {{aye}} || {{tl|nay}} and {{tl|N}} || {{nay}} |- | {{tl|ya}} || {{Ya}} || {{tl|na}} || {{Na}} |- | {{tl|yan}} || {{Yan}} || {{tl|nan}} || {{Nan}} |- | {{tl|check mark-n}} || {{Check mark-n}} || {{tl|x mark-n}} || {{X mark-n}} |- | {{tl|y&}} || {{Y&}} || {{tl|n&}} || {{N&}} |- | {{tl|Chk}} || {{Chk}} ||   ||   |- | {{tl|yeac}} || {{yeac}} || {{tl|nayc}} || {{nayc}} |- | {{tl|yeag}} || {{yeag}} || {{tl|nayg}} || {{nayg}} |- | {{tl|Mby}} || {{Mby}} || {{tl|nayd}} || {{nayd}} |- | {{tl|checked box}}
{{tl|ticked box}} || {{Checked box}} | {{tl|unchecked box}}
{{tl|unticked box}} || {{Unchecked box}} |- | {{tl|xed box}} || {{Xed box}} | {{tl|unexed box}} || {{Unexed box}} |- | {{tl|question mark box}} || {{question mark box}} || |- ! colspan=4 | Other marks |- | {{tl|n.b.}} || {{n.b.}} || {{tl|hmmm}} || {{hmmm}} |- | {{tl|bang}} || {{bang}} || {{tl|idkc}} || {{idkc}} |- | {{tl|equc}} || {{equc}} || {{tl|cloc}} || {{cloc}} |- |colspan=4| ''Most of the templates above are fully sortable in a [[Help:Sortable tables|class="sortable" table]] (each check mark is assigned an undisplayed "Y" and each cross mark an undisplayed "N").'' |- |} [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
